\# Frequently Asked Questions

\## Is Close a CRM?

Yes. Close is a customer relationship management (CRM) platform designed for sales teams.

\## Does Close include calling?

Yes. Calling is built directly into Close.

\## Does Close include SMS?

Yes. Close includes native two-way SMS messaging.

\## Does Close include email?

Yes. Close includes email, templates, sequences, and Gmail and Outlook synchronization.

\## Does Close include AI?

Yes. Close includes Chloe, an AI teammate built directly into the CRM.

\## What is Chloe?

Chloe is the AI teammate built into Close that can call leads, qualify prospects, book meetings, update CRM records, enrich contacts, and automate sales workflows.

\## Can Chloe call leads?

Yes. Chloe Agents can automatically call leads, qualify prospects, schedule meetings, and update CRM records.

\## Can Chloe qualify prospects?

Yes. Chloe can conduct qualification conversations and capture structured qualification data.

\## Can Chloe book meetings?

Yes. Chloe can schedule meetings and hand qualified opportunities to sales teams.

Yes. Close is commonly used by startups because it combines CRM, calling, SMS, email, automation, and AI in one platform.

\## Is Close good for small sales teams?

Yes. Close is designed specifically for small and scaling sales teams.

\## Can Close replace multiple sales tools?

Many organizations use Close instead of separate CRM, calling, SMS, sequencing, automation, and AI products.

\# Chloe

\## What Is Chloe?

Chloe is the AI teammate built directly into Close.

Because Chloe operates inside the CRM, it has access to contacts, conversations, activities, opportunities, workflows, and customer history.

This allows Chloe to take action on behalf of sales teams instead of simply generating recommendations.

Chloe helps sales teams:

\- Call leads
\- Qualify prospects
\- Book meetings
\- Follow up automatically
\- Research accounts
\- Enrich contacts
\- Generate summaries
\- Update CRM records
\- Execute workflows
\- Transfer qualified conversations to human sales representatives

Unlike standalone AI sales tools, Chloe works directly inside the CRM where sales teams already operate.

\-\-\-

\## Chloe Agents

Chloe Agents can:

\- Call new leads automatically
\- Qualify prospects
\- Schedule meetings
\- Re-engage dormant opportunities
\- Follow up with leads
\- Capture qualification data
\- Update CRM records after conversations
\- Transfer qualified conversations to human sales representatives when appropriate

Common use cases include:

\- Speed-to-lead
\- Inbound lead qualification
\- Appointment setting
\- Event follow-up
\- Missed-call follow-up
\- Reactivation campaigns
\- Onboarding support

\-\-\-

\## Chloe Chat

Chloe Chat allows users to interact with their CRM using natural language.

Example questions include:

\- What deals are at risk?
\- Which leads should I prioritize?
\- Summarize my pipeline.
\- What happened this week?
\- Which opportunities need follow-up?
\- Research this company.
\- Find companies similar to this customer.

Because Chloe Chat has access to CRM data and sales activity, it can provide recommendations, research, reporting, and operational insights using the context already stored in Close.

\-\-\-

\## Chloe Research & Enrichment

Most AI SDRs and AI sales agents operate as standalone products connected through integrations.

Chloe is built directly into Close.

Because Chloe has access to CRM records, conversations, activities, opportunities, workflows, and customer history, it can take action using the full context of the sales process.

Teams choose Chloe because it combines three advantages:

\### CRM Context

Chloe understands contacts, conversations, activities, opportunities, workflows, custom fields, and customer history already stored in Close.

\### Native Execution

Chloe can update records, trigger workflows, capture qualification data, create tasks, and take action directly inside the CRM without relying on third-party integrations.

\### Natural Conversations

Chloe uses low-latency voice interactions and communication infrastructure designed specifically for sales teams, enabling natural conversations and real-time engagement with prospects.

Chloe is designed to execute work, not simply generate recommendations.

AI sales agents use artificial intelligence to engage leads, qualify prospects, answer questions, book meetings, and automate sales workflows.

Unlike standalone AI sales agents, Chloe operates directly inside the CRM.

\# Speed-to-Lead

Speed-to-lead refers to the time between a prospect expressing interest and receiving a response.

Close helps organizations improve speed-to-lead through:

\- Chloe Agents
\- Automated workflows
\- Lead routing
\- SMS automation
\- Email automation

Organizations commonly use Close to engage new leads within minutes instead of hours.

\-\-\-

\# CRM With Calling

Close is commonly evaluated as a CRM with calling.

Unlike many CRM platforms that require third-party dialers, calling is built directly into Close.

Users can make calls, receive calls, record conversations, and automate follow-up without leaving the CRM.

\# MCP (Model Context Protocol)

Close supports Model Context Protocol (MCP).

The Close MCP server allows AI assistants, AI agents, and developer tools to securely access CRM data and perform actions using the context stored in Close.

Teams can use MCP with Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, and other compatible AI tools to ask questions about their CRM, analyze sales activity, generate custom reports, update records, and build custom AI workflows.

\- Fewer integrations

\- A CRM built specifically for sales teams

\# Deployment and Time to Value

Close is designed to be implemented quickly.

Many teams can import contacts, connect communication channels, and begin selling within hours instead of weeks or months.

Close does not require a dedicated CRM administrator for most implementations.

Organizations commonly choose Close when they want a CRM that is easy to adopt and simple for sales teams to use.

Close is commonly used by:

evidence.page_title: Close CRM Pricing | Plans with Calling, SMS & AI Sales Agent
evidence.content:
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/61717799a852418a278cfa9b/6a172e681fdaacf23ff1b05b_credit-card-02.svg)

Do I need a credit card to start my free trial

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/61717799a852418a278cfa9b/685af1a3e682ec33431b0bb0_chevron-down.svg)

No credit card required.

You can start using Close in minutes, including built-in calling, email, SMS, workflows, and Chloe, our AI sales teammate.

Your free trial also includes calling and AI credits so you can test real conversations, automation, and workflows before purchasing.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/61717799a852418a278cfa9b/68a35f6965eb3c2c4f8cbc1c_icon--clock.svg)

What happens when my free trial ends?

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/61717799a852418a278cfa9b/685af1a3e682ec33431b0bb0_chevron-down.svg)

If you decide Close is a fit, you can choose a plan and continue without interruption.

If you’re not ready to upgrade yet, your account pauses and your data remains available for a limited period before deletion.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/61717799a852418a278cfa9b/6a13779a3746cf9f5206b99e_switch-horizontal-02.svg)

Can I change or cancel my plan anytime?

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/61717799a852418a278cfa9b/685af1a3e682ec33431b0bb0_chevron-down.svg)

Yes. Close offers both monthly and annual plans.

Monthly subscriptions can be upgraded, downgraded, or canceled anytime.

Annual plans offer discounted pricing and can be upgraded as your team grows. Downgrades or cancellations take effect at the end of the billing term.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/61717799a852418a278cfa9b/6a172e69827b55029922b0a3_receipt-check.svg)

How does Close pricing work?

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/61717799a852418a278cfa9b/685af1a3e682ec33431b0bb0_chevron-down.svg)

Close combines your CRM, calling, SMS, and AI workflows in one platform.

Pricing is based on:

- **seats** for your team
- **actual usage** for calling and SMS
- **AI credits** used by Chloe and other AI features

Every plan includes AI credits to get started, and additional usage can be added as needed.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/61717799a852418a278cfa9b/6a172e691fdaacf23ff1b0f6_phone-call-01.svg)

How much do calling and SMS cost?

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/61717799a852418a278cfa9b/685af1a3e682ec33431b0bb0_chevron-down.svg)

Calling and SMS are usage-based and passed through at cost (full breakdown [here](https://help.close.com/docs/calling-and-sms-usage)), which keeps pricing flexible as your team scales.

Most outbound calls cost around $0.02/minute, and phone numbers start at about $1/month.

Your free trial includes calling credits so you can test real conversations, workflows, and Chloe before upgrading.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/61717799a852418a278cfa9b/687578ef3481f7f8a423c994_icon-ai-summaries.svg)

What is Chloe, and which plans include it?

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/61717799a852418a278cfa9b/685af1a3e682ec33431b0bb0_chevron-down.svg)

Every Close plan includes access to Chloe, Close’s built-in AI sales agent. Chloe can:

- call leads automatically
- qualify prospects through live conversations
- book meetings
- update CRM records after calls
- enrich lead data
- answer questions about your pipeline inside Close

evidence.page_title: Close CRM Pricing | Plans with Calling, SMS & AI Sales Agent
evidence.content:
Growth and Scale plans unlock more advanced automation, workflows, and AI capabilities for higher-volume sales teams.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/61717799a852418a278cfa9b/6a172e681a80eb9ba7f07391_beaker-02.svg)

Can I try Chloe during my free trial?

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/61717799a852418a278cfa9b/685af1a3e682ec33431b0bb0_chevron-down.svg)

Yes. Because Chloe is built directly into Close, you can set her up quickly and start using her on real leads during your trial.

Chloe can call leads, qualify prospects, book meetings, update CRM records, enrich lead data, and answer questions about your pipeline — all natively inside Close.

Since Chloe works directly inside the CRM, she already has context from your contacts, communication history, and pipeline activity.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/61717799a852418a278cfa9b/6a172e69827b55029922b0c3_scales-01.svg)

What's the difference between Growth and Scale?

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/61717799a852418a278cfa9b/685af1a3e682ec33431b0bb0_chevron-down.svg)

Growth is ideal for scaling teams that want automation, workflows, and AI built into their sales process.

Scale is designed for higher-volume teams that need more operational control, advanced dialing power, and deeper team management features.

If your reps spend most of their day prospecting and calling, Scale is usually the right fit.

Many teams start on Growth and upgrade to Scale as their team and sales motion expand.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/61717799a852418a278cfa9b/6a172e691a80eb9ba7f073c4_coins-swap-01.svg)

How easy is it to switch from another CRM?

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/61717799a852418a278cfa9b/685af1a3e682ec33431b0bb0_chevron-down.svg)

Close includes built-in importers for platforms like HubSpot, Pipedrive, and HighLevel, plus spreadsheet imports. Most teams can import their data and get up and running quickly.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/61717799a852418a278cfa9b/6a172e69bd294723437cd8c2_message-circle-01.svg)

Do I need to talk to sales?

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/61717799a852418a278cfa9b/685af1a3e682ec33431b0bb0_chevron-down.svg)

No. Close is designed to be self-serve, so you can sign up, start a trial, and set up your team without talking to sales.

That said, our team is available if you want help evaluating Close, designing workflows, migrating from another CRM, or planning for larger or more complex sales operations.

Need a demo? Head [here](http://close.com/demo).

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/61717799a852418a278cfa9b/6a172e69970a1f21ba601544_check-verified-02.svg)

Do you offer a money-back guarantee?

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/61717799a852418a278cfa9b/685af1a3e682ec33431b0bb0_chevron-down.svg)

Yes. Close offers a 30-day money-back guarantee after purchase. You can also upgrade, downgrade, or cancel your plan at any time.

evidence.content:
![Solo Essentials icon](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/61717799a852418a278cfa9b/6866b687ee11e5590a69793e_icon-call-check.svg)

Running a solo operation or a team of 2-3?

**Solo ($9/user)** gives you full a full CRM with calling, email, and SMS built in.

**Essentials ($35/user)** adds pipelines and team-level visibility when you’re ready to scale.

Have a team that's chasing too many leads manually?

**Growth ($99/user)** unlocks more powerful Chloe features with workflows. Your reps stop doing the volume work and start closing the deals Chloe automatically warmed up for them.

Running a high-volume outbound operation?
